plan.failureSummary: The test failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because a cached selector representing 'Documentation' under the 'Resources' dropdown could not be found, likely due to changes in the Checkly website's navigation structure or class names.

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry test execution
remediationSteps.details: Clear the deterministic execution cache to force page.ai to re-evaluate the DOM, find the updated selector path for the 'Documentation' link under the 'Resources' dropdown, and cache the new valid selectors.

plan.notes: The run history shows a pattern of alternating success and failure where the deterministic cache occasionally runs out of sync or stale selector paths are utilized. Clearing the cache and allowing page.ai to execute autonomously to regenerate clean selectors is the best path forward.
